name: platform-core
description: Core shared packages for web, mobile, and backend services.

scripts.release:patch: git tag v%npm_package_version% && git push origin v%npm_package_version% && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=require('./package.json');const [maj,min,pat]=pkg.version.split('.').map(Number);const next=maj+'.'+min+'.'+(pat+1);pkg.version=next;pkg.tag='v'+next;fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2));"
